steps.t: Barrels of black-fire can be found in Orkish trenches in the War of Three Peaks. You have discovered barrels of black-fire used by the Orcs of Gundaba…
Reithvald Red-ember can be found at Ifbar-athrâkh. You have ignited and destroyed many barrels of black-fire in the Orkish trenches around Zudramdân. …
